Legal

Terms & Conditions

Welcome to Compressly. By using our website and services you agree to these Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully.

Use of Service

Compressly provides a browser-based file compression utility. You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and not to upload content that violates third-party rights.

Privacy

Your files are processed locally in the browser and are not uploaded to our servers. See our Privacy Policy for full details.

Limitation of Liability

Compressly is provided as-is. We disclaim liability for indirect or consequential damages. Always keep backups of your original files.

Contact

Questions about these terms can be sent to hello@compressly.app.
